name: Barvarian Veal
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Veal; cut into 4 thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the veal dry with paper towels.
2. Mix together salt, sugar, white pepper, and mustard.
3. Roll each slice of veal in the seasoning mixture.
4. Place a bacon slice on top of each piece of veal.
5. Place an unsliced egg on top of the bacon.
6. Roll up each slice of veal (jelly-roll fashion) and tie with string.
7. Heat oil in a frying pan and brown the veal rolls on all sides.
8. Add diced onion to the pan and sauté for 3 minutes.
9. Add hot beef bouillon, cover, and simmer gently for 25 minutes.
10. Remove the veal from the pan; remove strings from veal.
11. Keep veal warm on a serving platter.
12. Stir tomato paste into the pan drippings.
13. Mix flour and red wine in a separate bowl to remove lumps.
14. Add the mixture to the sauce and cook until thickened.
15. Add warmed veal rolls and heat through.
16. Before serving, place veal rolls on a platter; pour sauce over the rolls and serve with puréed potatoes.
